name: Spiced Bean Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Curry Powder or To Taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Cook and stir the meat and onion in a large skillet until the meat is brown. Drain off the excess fat.
3. Stir in the chopped apple, curry powder, mustard, and baked beans. Turn into an ungreased 1 1/2-quart casserole.
4. Arrange the apple slices on top of the bean mixture and cover.
5. Bake until hot, about 25 to 30 minutes.
